content.query:
--DROP VIEW v_ItemMaster

CREATE VIEW v_ItemMaster AS 

SELECT        'M3'                  [ERP]
            , ITNO                  [ItemNumber]
            , ITNE                  [OriginalItemNumber]
            , ITDS                  [Description]
            , ITCL                  [Brand Code]
            , BR.TX15               [Brand]
            , CASE WHEN I.GRP2 = 'COM' then 'COMMERCIAL' WHEN I.GRP2 = 'CMP' then 'COMPACT' else 'COUNTERTOP'
               end                     [Major Class]
          , CASE WHEN I.GRP3 = 'ADM' THEN 'ADMIRAL CRAFT' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'AFS' THEN 'AFS' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'BEV' THEN 'BEVLES'
               WHEN I.GRP3 = 'BLA' THEN 'BLAKESLEE' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'EDG' THEN 'EDGECRAFT' WHEN I.GRP3 = 'VIN' THEN 'VINOTEMP' 
               WHEN I.GRP3 = 'AVA' then 'AVANTI' ELSE 'TBD' 
                END                     [Finance Brand]
            , ITGR                  [Category Code]
            , CA.TX15               [Category]
            , ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')
              + CASE WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')=SC.TX40 THEN '' 
                     WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')<>''     THEN '|'+SC.TX40 
                     ELSE '' 
                END                 [Sub-Category]
            , 0.00                  [Cost]
            , PUPR                  [Price]
            , CASE MABU WHEN '1' THEN '1|MAKE'
                        WHEN '2' THEN '2|BUY'
              END                  [Make or Buy]
            , CASE WHEN PRGP='' THEN 'UP' 
                   ELSE PRGP 
              END
              +'|'+CP.TX15          [Comp or FG]
            , 'ACTIVE'              [ItemType]
FROM            M3.MITMAS I
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB BR ON I.ITCL=BR.STKY AND BR.STCO='ITCL'   --Brand Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CA ON I.ITGR=CA.STKY AND CA.STCO='ITGR'   --Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CRPDLN SC ON I.PDLN=SC.PDLN                      --Sub-Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CP ON I.PRGP=CP.STKY AND CP.STCO='PRGP'   --Comp or FG
    -- LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB IT ON I.ITTY=IT.STKY AND IT.STCO='ITTY'   --Item Type
WHERE I.CONO='100' AND STAT='20'
/*
UNION ALL

SELECT    'Visual'                          [ERP]
        , ID                                [ItemNumber]
        , ID                                [OriginalItemNumber]
        , P.[DESCRIPTION]                   [Description]
        , ''                                [Brand Code]
        , P.USER_1                          [Brand]
        , CASE WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'AVANTI', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'DUURA', 'BRAMA', 'ELEMENT') then 'COMPACT' else 'COUNTERTOP'
          END                                 [Major Class]
        , CASE WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'BRAMA', 'ELEMENT') THEN 'VINOTEMP' WHEN P.USER_1 IN ('AVANTI', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'DUURA') THEN 'AVANTI' ELSE 'EDGECRAFT'
          END                                 [Finance Brand]
        , P.PRODUCT_CODE                    [Category Code]
        , C.DESCRIPTION                     [Category] 
        , ''                                [Sub-Category]
        , I.unit_material_cost              [Cost]
        , I.unit_price                      [Price] 
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(I.FABRICATED, P.FABRICATED)='Y' THEN '1|MAKE'
               WHEN ISNULL(I.PURCHASED, P.PURCHASED)='Y'   THEN '2|BUY'
          END                               [Make or Buy]
        , CASE WHEN P.PRODUCT_CODE='99' THEN 'CP|COMPONENTS'
               ELSE 'FG|FINISHED GOOD'
          END                               [Comp or FG]
        , P.USER_10                           [ItemType]
FROM            ECM.PART    P 
      LEFT JOIN ECM.PRODUCT C ON P.PRODUCT_CODE=C.CODE
      LEFT JOIN ECM.PART_SITE I ON P.ID=I.PART_ID
      */
